'''Ina''' was the grandmother of [[Tray]].

She was retired in the worker world of [[Vorzyd IV]], and this meant that anyone who did not work, died. Ina was lucky, because her granddaughter used to visit her and have a talk.

Then, she attended the meeting where the workers and retired people would discuss the future with the [[Freelies]]. But suddenly, the building exploded, because [[Flip]] placed bombs there. Fortunately, she suffered reversible injuries.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
